name: Abhishek Tara Moon/Mars Exact — Recognition Day
description: When Moon or Mars transits the exact 28th nakshatra from birth Moon (Abhishek Tara), it pinpoints the exact day of public recognition, award ceremony, or coronation moment.

source_text.quote: The day when the Moon or Mars occupies the Abhishek Tara (28th nakshatra from birth) is auspicious for coronation, anointing, and receiving public honor.

all_of: Transit Moon or Mars is in the 28th nakshatra from birth Moon nakshatra (Abhishek Tara)

interpretation.meaning: The fast-moving Moon (every 27 days) or Mars (every 45 days) hitting the Abhishek Tara nakshatra pinpoints the exact day when recognition manifests — award announcements, ceremony dates, viral moments.

metadata.notes: Moon hits this every 27 days, Mars every ~45 days. Only meaningful when Layers 1+2 are already active.
